title: O. Henry's Full House
director: Henry Hathaway, Howard Hawks, Henry King
writer: Lamar Trotti, Richard L. Breen, Ivan Goff
actors: Fred Allen, Anne Baxter, Jeanne Crain
plot: John Steinbeck introduces a quintet of five of O. Henry's most celebrated stories from his New York Period (1902-1910) in this anthology film.
